calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a Prove-Up hearing, reassigned from Monday's Master Calendar to Dept.#218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
No appearance by the Cross Defendant: Osprey Boat Company.
Patrick J. Byrne, Esq. for Cross Complainant: Boat and Motor Mart, represented by Jay Veach, was sworn & examined.
Dismissal with prejudice as to the Complaint filed March 9, 2004.
This matter is for Prove-Up as to the Cross Complaint.
After hearing testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Cross Complainant: Boat and Motor Mart, Inc. and against the Cross Defendant: Osprey Boat Company as follows:
Damages in the amount of $16,170.00
Costs of $427.00
For the total of $16,597.00
Judgment signed in open court.
